description_long: This all-terrain vehicle features a rugged, military-inspired design with a robust frame and reinforced body panels. The vehicle is equipped with four large, knobby tires designed for optimal traction on rough and uneven surfaces. The open cabin includes seating for multiple occupants, with visible roll cages for added safety and structural integrity. The front windshield is tinted blue, providing a distinctive visual contrast against the matte gray and metallic body. Some variants are fitted with mounted weaponry, such as a turret or rocket launcher, indicating a tactical or combat-oriented purpose. The rear cargo area is open, allowing for the transport of equipment or additional passengers.
description: A rugged, military-style all-terrain vehicle with large knobby tires, blue-tinted windshield, and visible roll cage. Some variants feature mounted weaponry and an open rear cargo area.
description_view_0: Side view showing three vehicle variants, highlighting the open cabin, roll cage, and mounted weaponry on the topmost vehicle.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the blue-tinted windshields, wide stance, and the different weapon mounts on each vehicle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the open rear cargo area and the structural details of the roll cage.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the vehicles, including the open cargo space and the rear structure of the roll cage.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a knobby, blocky tread pattern designed for maximum grip on loose, uneven, or muddy terrain, making them suitable for all-terrain use.
